message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this chat is being logged. Your Nira Finance account ending ****4831 shows ₹12,921 due. I’ve noted that you will not be able to pay this month. What month do you expect you may next be able to make a payment?
I can’t commit to any month right now.
Understood. Are you currently receiving any regular income?
No, I’m unemployed right now and I can’t pay.
Understood. Do you expect any income to start within the next 30 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 30 days.
Understood. I’ve noted that you do not expect income within the next 30 days and cannot pay at this time. I will route this for the next step.

Debt context already established: Nira Finance account ending ****4831 with \u20b912,921 due. Borrower\u2019s stated position is that they cannot pay this month, cannot commit to any future payment month, are unemployed, cannot pay now, and do not expect any income within the next 30 days. Hardship signals present: job loss/unemployment and inability to pay. Financial facts learned: no current regular income, no expected income within 30 days, no payment timing available. No dispute raised, no stop-contact request, and no refusal beyond inability to commit. Already asked: expected next payment month, whether borrower has regular income, and whether income is expected within 30 days. Agent 2 should continue from hardship/inability-to-pay routing without repeating identity verification, disclosure, debt establishment, or the same assessment questions."}

I can’t pay anything right now, and I’m not committing to a date.

Under Nira Finance policy, I can note that you are unable to pay now and are not giving a payment date. There is no extension beyond 30 days available. Reduced closure or a structured payment plan can only be discussed if you can provide a workable payment amount or timing. If your situation changes, you can return with either a lump-sum amount you can arrange or a proposed installment start date.

I’m not able to give a date or amount right now.

Noted. Since you are not providing any payment date or amount, there is no payment arrangement to place on the account at this stage. For Nira Finance account ****4831, the due amount remains ₹12,921. Nira Finance does not allow extensions beyond 30 days, and reduced closure or installment review can only proceed if you provide a specific lump-sum amount or a specific payment schedule. As of now, this case remains unresolved and will continue through the lender’s next collections process. If you want review of a reduced closure or payment plan later, send the exact amount you can pay and the exact date.
